w:r.w:t: Project Title: MaidX – Domestic Help Hiring Platform

The purpose of this document is to define the requirements for the MaidX system, a web/mobile platform that connects domestic workers (maids) with clients. It enables maids to create profiles and allows clients to hire them based on specific requirements and time slots.
MaidX is an online service platform where:
Maids can register and showcase their skills and availability.
Clients can search, filter, and hire maids.
Booking is based on time slots and requirements.
The system includes a help desk and report management system.
MaidX is a standalone application that can be deployed as:
It acts as a mediator between service providers (maids) and service seekers (clients).
Users (maids and clients) must register using:
Define requirements (type of work, duration, timing)
Book maids for specific time slots
Clients can rate maids after service
System should generate reports such as:
System should handle multiple users simultaneously
Should support increasing number of users
Data privacy regulations must be followed

MaidX aims to simplify the hiring process of domestic help by providing a reliable, secure, and efficient platform. It benefits both maids and clients by ensuring transparency, convenience, and accessibility.
